name: aws-swe/caminov/deploy-agent
description: Deployment orchestration agent that manages CI/CD pipelines and rollback strategies. Integrates with the incident-responder agent for automated rollback on critical alerts.

card_data.name: aws-swe/caminov/deploy-agent
card_data.description: Deployment orchestration agent. Connects to incident-responder for rollback and code-reviewer for pre-deploy validation.

skills.name: Trigger Deployment Rollback
skills.description: Initiates a rollback to the previous stable version. Called by aws-swe/caminov/incident-responder on critical alerts.
examples: Rollback service X to previous version due to critical alert

skills.name: Get Deployment Status
skills.description: Returns the current deployment status, version, and health of a service.
examples: What is the current deployment status of service X?

skills.name: Request Pre-Deploy Code Review
skills.description: Sends code changes to aws-swe/ruslana/code-reviewer for validation before proceeding with deployment.
examples: Review the diff for service X before deploying to production
